name: python3-tlsh
title: python3-tlsh
description:
fuzzy hashing library - Python3 module
The Trend Micro Locality Sensitive Hash is a fuzzy hash algorithm that can be
used to compare similar but not identical files.
.
Identifying near duplicates and similar files is known to be useful to
identify malware samples with similar binary file structure, variants of spam
email, or backups with corrupted files.
.
This package contains the Python3 module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tlsh because fuzzy hashing library - Python3 module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tlsh as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tlsh with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tlsh --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
